output.final_deliverable: Data for the requested top-5 languages by GitHub repository count in 2024 is not present in the current merged results. I will fetch authoritative numbers from GitHub's Octoverse 2024 reports and return: 1) five languages with repos_2024, repos_2023 (or percent_change_from_2023), percent_change_from_2023, primary_use_cases, and source_urls; 2) identify the language with the largest percentage growth; 3) trend analysis and a 2-year forecast with reasoning and key risks. All data will be cited from official sources such as Octoverse 2024 pages and GitHub Blog posts. (Sources to consult include: https://octoverse.github.com/ and https://github.blog/).
output.action_summary: The merged results do not include the actual numeric counts or percentage changes needed. Next steps: fetch the 2024 top-5 languages by repository count from GitHub Octoverse 2024, capture repos_2024 and repos_2023 (or percent_change_from_2023) for each language, gather primary use cases from language context (e.g., web development, data science, enterprise apps), and cite sources. Then determine which language had the largest growth, perform a trend-based analysis, and forecast which language might overtake the current leader within two years, outlining assumptions and risks. Expected outputs will be a list of five languages with exact counts and changes, a note on the leader and its growth rate, and a narrative forecast supported by cited sources (Octoverse 2024 pages and GitHub Blog).
